Cache.DefinitionImpl TYPE: string/null VERSION: 2.0.0 DEFAULT: 'Serializer' --DESCRIPTION-- This directive defines which method to use when caching definitions, the complex data-type that makes HTML Purifier tick. Set to null to disable caching (not recommended, as you will see a definite performance degradation). --ALIASES-- Core.DefinitionCache --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
